title: The Proliferation of Functions in IT Infrastructure
description: This flowchart illustrates how a single, monolithic server historically handled multiple functions, and how modern virtualization and containerization have led to an increased number of separate, specialized functions, impacting resource utilization and sustainability.
relationships: Hosts multiple functions on one OS
Runs as an isolated guest on the hypervisor
Runs as an isolated guest on the hypervisor
Runs as a lightweight, isolated process on the engine
Runs as a lightweight, isolated process on the engine
Provides the underlying physical compute resources for all layers
